allow: PowerShell($node = \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($node\) { node --version } else { "no node" }; $npx = \(Get-Command npx -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($npx\) { "npx ok" } else { "no npx" }; $py = \(Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($py\) { python --version } else { "no python" })
